failedAssertions.reason: Traceability links included many non-existent file paths (31 missing in this run).
Re-running Act 2 did not update Solution entities or stale Act 3 status semantics.
No new implementation links were recorded; project-scoped build path 404 and /api/build returned files_written=[].
Auto-linked file_path values did not resolve on disk (31 missing).
API links did not consistently map to existing route handler files/functions.
Entities entries lacked required type+migration+implementation link coverage.
Behaviours entries lacked test-type links alongside implementation links.
Components/views links referenced missing or inconsistent file targets.
Spec change + rebuild did not update/mark stale traceability links.
Unlinked-spec warning indicators were not observable in expanded lists despite non-zero unlinked counts.
UI did not render line-range GitHub anchors for entry with line_range metadata.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Shared runtime had preloaded non-empty traceability data and no safe isolated reset path.
Large-scale precondition unavailable (no 50+ entities / 100+ linked files dataset).
Could not induce partial-codegen state; builds completed with files_written=[] and no traceability delta.
Build produced no new links, so in-session matrix update behavior could not be exercised.
Fresh empty traceability state unavailable in shared runtime without disruptive reset.

appliedUpdates.description: Added misc-2 round-1 validation notes (project-scoped traceability availability, build-path mismatch, stale file-path behavior, and blocking preconditions).
